candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to the exact total current assets label.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not the target.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current-assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet cash.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet cash.
Balancing line, not cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the exact balance-sheet cash label.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported current-liabilities total.

candidates.why: Explicit current portion of debt due within one year; best match for short-term debt/current maturities.
Could be borrowing, but label is ambiguous because it appears in both current and non-current sections and may overlap with debt maturities; excluded to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit within-1-year debt maturity line. Excluded lease liabilities per rule and excluded Government loan to avoid possible double counting with the maturity schedule.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line on the balance sheet; best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Deferred tax is not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected a confident exact tax-payable label outside the shortlist.

candidates.why: Best reported net total for tangible fixed assets / PPE under IFRS-style presentation.
Gross PPE total, but net/total tangible assets is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not the PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross asset line, not preferred baseline total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of intangible and tangible assets
candidates.why: Cash flow line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred the reported net tangible-assets line as the best PPE proxy. Included the gross PPE label as a secondary fallback if labeling changes across years.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact operating cash flow label.
Also an operating cash flow total; useful fallback if label varies by year.

variables.notes: Both labels represent operating cash flow totals; ordered by preference with the more explicit net-cash label first.
